# Techlution AI Website - Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview
Modern, responsive React website for Techlution AI - End-to-End AI-Powered IT Solutions | Innovate · Automate · Elevate.

## Technology Stack
- **Framework**: React 18 with Vite
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **Animations**: Framer Motion
- **Icons**: Lucide React
- **Typescript**: Enabled for type safety

## Project Structure
```
src/
├── components/
│   ├── common/
│   │   ├── Button.tsx
│   │   ├── Card.tsx
│   │   └── Section.tsx
│   ├── sections/
│   │   ├── Hero.tsx
│   │   ├── Services.tsx
│   │   ├── Process.tsx
│   │   ├── Projects.tsx
│   │   └── Contact.tsx
│   └── layout/
│       ├── Header.tsx
│       └── Footer.tsx
├── App.tsx
└── index.css
```

## Key Requirements
- Premium, futuristic UI with glassmorphism
- Smooth animations using Framer Motion
- Fully responsive (mobile, tablet, desktop)
- 6 service categories, 8-step process, 10 projects
- Contact information for Rana Muhammad Aleem Akhtar

## Build & Run
```bash
npm run dev      # Start development server
npm run build    # Build for production
npm run preview  # Preview production build
```
